FormulaField.expression: if length([ZIP]) = 1 then "00"+[ZIP] elseif length([ZIP]) = 2 then "0"+[ZIP] else [ZIP] endif

Annotation.DefaultAnnotationText: ZIP = if length([ZIP]) = 1 then "00"+[ZIP] elseif length([ZIP]) = 2 then "0"+[ZI...

Field.name: Total_patients_discharged_from_hospital_in_a_12_month_period__Exclude_SNF__NF__Observation__Hospice_
Field.source: CrossTab:Header:detail_desc:Total patients discharged from hospital in a 12-month period (Exclude SNF, NF, Observation, Hospice):Sum:

Configuration.Text: For any given Detail_ID there is only ever a "Text" or "Numeric" data type.
Must manually update IQVIA data each month
Determining the other similar facilities within X miles (I.e. this hopsital has 2 other hospitals within 5 miles, etc.)
Determine Population for which each facility is nth nearest (within mileag limit, 100 miles for 1st nearest, 20 miles for others)

Field.name: Zip
Field.source: Formula: IF (isnull([ZIP]) || [ZIP]=="") then [ZIP] elseif LENGTH([ZIP])<5 THEN PADLEFT([ZIP], 5, "0") ELSE [ZIP] ENDIF

Field.name: SpatialObj
Field.source: Formula: IF IsNull([Z9_Point]) THEN [SpatialObj] ELSE [Z9_Point] ENDIF

Field.name: Lat
Field.source: Formula: IF IsNull([Z9_Point]) THEN [Lat] ELSE [Z9_Latitude] ENDIF

Field.name: Lon
Field.source: Formula: IF IsNull([Z9_Point]) THEN [Lon] ELSE [Z9_Longitude] ENDIF

Field.name: GeoLevel
Field.source: Formula: IF [GeoLevel]=="ZIP0" THEN "Not Coded" ELSE [GeoLevel] ENDIF

Field.name: CensusId
Field.source: Formula: IF IsNull([Z9_Point]) THEN [CensusId] ELSE [Z9_Census_ID] ENDIF

Annotation.DefaultAnnotationText: SpatialObj_Buffer Where Target Touches or Intersects Universe SpatialObj
SpatialObj_Buffer Where Target Touches or Intersects Universe SpatialObj
SpatialObj_Buffer Where Target Touches or Intersects Universe SpatialObj
SpatialObj_Buffer Where Target Touches or Intersects Universe SpatialObj
SpatialObj_Buffer Where Target Intersects Universe SpatialObj
SpatialObj_Buffer Where Target Intersects Universe SpatialObj
SpatialObj_Buffer Where Target Intersects Universe SpatialObj
SpatialObj_Buffer Where Target Intersects Universe SpatialObj

Configuration.Text:
Census Data
For Field name descrpitions see: \\cardinalhealth.net\Applications\OH001\AnalyticsInfoMgmt\Teams\Performance Optimization\Projects\Analytics Projects\GHX_PredictiveModel\Data\Tract_2010Census_DP1\DP_TableDescriptions.xls
Data Source: https://www2.census.gov/geo/tiger/TIGER2010DP1/Tract_2010Census_DP1.zip
Data source menu: https://www2.census.gov/geo/tiger/TIGER2010DP1/
Manual update of dates. Should align with GHX data range

Field.name: I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products RD
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products Rep
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products RVP
IsKit
Field.source: Formula: IF (CategoryGroupId == '70' OR (CategoryGroupId != '70' AND (FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'KIT') != -1) OR (FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'TRAY') != -1) OR (FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'LAB PRESOURCE') != -1)) AND ((FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'KITCHEN') == -1) ) AND (FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'FOOD') == -1) AND (FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'SURGICAL LAP MAYO TRAYS') == -1) AND (FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'MAYO STANDS') == -1)) AND SubcategoryId NOT IN ('700K700001304','700E700010035','700K700001004','700E700010034','700N700010038','700K700001006') THEN 1 ELSE 0 ENDIF (BatchMacro)

Field.name: IsPerformancePlus
Field.source: Formula: if [SourceTypeId] = 'NBP' and [ExternalMaterialGroupDesc] = 'Preferred' then 1 else 0 endif (BatchMacro)

Field.name: Long Term Care RD Node ID
Long Term Care Rep Node ID
Long Term Care RVP Node ID

SelectField.field: I.S. Acute Hospitals RD Node ID
I.S. Acute Hospitals Rep Node ID
I.S. Acute Hospitals RVP Node ID
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products RD
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products Rep
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products RVP
Long Term Care RD Node ID
Long Term Care RVP Node ID
Long Term Care Rep Node ID
